text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Parole * Juvenile Offenders 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Juvenile Offenders Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON YOUTH AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Oregon Youth Authority (OYA) is responsible for the supervision, management, and administration of youth correctional facilities, state juvenile parole and probation services, community out-of-home placements for youth in custody, and other functions related to state programs for juvenile justice. 530 Center Street NE Suite 500 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Call for information Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 373-7205 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON YOUTH AUTHORITY OREGON YOUTH AUTHORITY
